text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Look, I know you became cheer<n>captain because you want to support<n>Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What? I never said that! A<n>f-f-f-first-rate cheer captain would<n>never show such bias to just one<n>competitor!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're not fooling me. And you<n>won't fool the others for long, either.<n>...But we can see how hard you're<n>working to be a great leader.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And it's because you're working so<n>hard that I want to tell you something.<n>A secret just between the two of us.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I mean this is an embarrassing story<n>about me! You see, the reason I<n>wanted to join the Cheer Squad this<n>year is...

text_block_list.name: Fishmonger
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Natie and... is this the cheer<n>captain you told us about? I hear<n>you're both giving the Cheer Squad<n>your all. I'm cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text: Cheering for the Cheer Squad... isn't<n>that a funny thought! Hehe. Oh, how<n>about some juice for the road? Here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha. Thanks, both of you.

text_block_list.name: Bar Owner
text_block_list.text: Don't mention it! All of us here are on<n>your cheer squad, Natie! You can do it!<n>Woo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cheer squad?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... Well, they don't have any<n>uniforms or musical instruments...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But this "cheer squad" here is the<n>reason why I wanted to join the<n>Tracen Cheer Squad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I had this goal I knew was beyond<n>me, but I still didn't want to give up. I<n>found out what it was like to get up<n>on the wrong stage.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: When I looked around, I realized how<n>big the stage was. That's when<n>regret finally sank in. I felt frozen in<n>place.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My hands even started shaking, but<n>then...

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Folks
text_block_list.text: Natie! We believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A wave of encouraging cheers<n>washed over me, pushing me<n>forward.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: They make the best cheer squad, the<n>people here. They're so good at it,<n>they made me want to cheer for<n>others and pass on the<n>encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So since we're here, why don't you<n>get a few tips from an experienced<n>cheer squad? They might just teach<n>you something useful!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So that's why you brought me here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And now I'll pass the floor to the<n>folks here! ...Don't look at me like<n>that. I'm not used to these kinds of<n>talks, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Greengrocer
text_block_list.text: Hm... the secret to supporting others?<n>Let's see... I'd say it's sincerity that<n>matters. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Butcher
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I know! If you both need help,<n>this calls for a strategy meeting!<n>Gather round, guys!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha? N-no need for a meeting. I was<n>just looking for a few tips.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: What's this? Are we putting our<n>heads together? Then I'll go and get<n>some coffee going...

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text: Oh, nice! We'd love some of your<n>coffee! All right, let's do this, folks!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So this is Nature's cheer squad.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Heh. Excuse the noise we're making<n>at this time of night. When it comes to<n>Natie, we can't help but get worked<n>up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. No, I was just thinking how your<n>voices were in unison like a real<n>squad.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm glad you think so. That's<n>the one thing our shopping street has<n>going for it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Does anyone lead your group? Have<n>you ever organized something special<n>to support Nature?

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Haha, I can't say we have. We don't<n>have a leader, and we've never<n>prepared anything extravagant either.

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: We just got to chatting, leaned on<n>each other, and since we all wanted<n>to support Natie, our voices came<n>together naturally.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ... You just got to chatting... and<n>leaned on each other? That's all?

text_block_list.name: Candy Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Heh. Sorry to state the obvious. I'm<n>sure you already knew that, as cheer<n>captain.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...No, you've given me a much<n>needed reminder.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, King? Did you get any good<n>advice?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, very. So...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Let's keep trying our best together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Mm... It may be boring, but I realized<n>that we should start with the basics!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: We're a squad, so we ought to hear<n>each other out and show more<n>appreciation for each other. Because<n>at the end of the day...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: People don't team up by deciding to<n>follow one person, but by wanting to<n>build something together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh... Heh... Hehehe! I see. So this is a<n>little token of your appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, you're so awkward—and<n>way too serious. This is like a scene<n>from a drama. The classic coworkers<n>bonding over a coffee on the roof.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... yeah, you're right. Let's do our<n>best to create something that'll<n>inspire all our friends in the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Pah, you got me sounding all corny<n>too. I'm way out of my depth here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I appreciate it all the same. So, here.<n>Will you accept this?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course. Hehe. Red bean soup,<n>though? That's an interesting choice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's wrong with it?! Of all the<n>drinks in the vending machine, this<n>one looked like it'd warm you up the<n>most!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for today. I feel I got<n>some hints from speaking with you<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text: Oh, glad to hear it! Good luck, cheer<n>captain! Oh yeah, if you need any<n>more help...

text_block_list.name: Tofu Maker
text_block_list.text: You should try speaking with last<n>year's leader, Bamboo. She did a<n>fantastic job!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's right! Seeking guidance<n>from last year's leader is a great<n>idea! I'll ask Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: King and Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, Bamboo?!
